content: Dagster software-defined assets declare what data should exist and how it derives from upstream. Assets use @dg.asset decorator, dependencies via deps parameter, IO managers abstract storage (read/write), resources provide dependency injection for external services. Multi-assets output multiple results from single function. Graph-assets compose multiple operations into single output. Asset checks enable blocking data quality gates. Partitions enable incremental processing. IO managers swap per-environment without changing asset code.
